title: Verify existing implementation of taskify context injection
description: Verification of taskify stage context injection completed. Project memory content from .kody/memory.md does NOT appear in pipeline taskify logs (buildFullPromptTiered reads from .kody/memory/ directory instead). File tree does NOT appear in pipeline taskify logs (not included by buildFullPromptTiered). No raw {{TASK_CONTEXT}} template tokens found (correctly replaced). Root cause: buildFullPromptTiered in src/context.ts only reads from .kody/memory/ directory and does not include git ls-files output, unlike the standalone kody taskify command which correctly includes both.
